suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify runtime-worker validation procedure to explicitly allow a documented unit-test-only exception path for pure state-mutator fixes that do not affect browser-visible runtime flows.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of fix-m4-mock-runtime-event-log-reset-on-lock-clear found a pure MockAppStateProvider mutator fix with focused vitest coverage; current runtime-worker wording can be interpreted as requiring Playwright in every case.
